canonical_answer: A clear glass bowl sits on a light-colored wooden table surface. A hand pours clear liquid from a white measuring cup into the bowl. Later, a white plastic bottle is tilted to release white glue into the same container. Text overlays identify the ingredients as warm water and school glue throughout the process.
